title: Rolson LED Work Light with Adjustable Strong clamp – Magnetic Fixing and 75mm Wide Super Strong Jaws 61448
features: Large very strong clamp with 75mm jaw opening
Twin movable clamps 32mm deep by 40mm wide with pole clamp jaw feature
Slip resisting handle curved and styled to assist strong grip – the spring-loaded jaws have a tremendous level of pressure
The clamp has a 360deg rotating bracket with ball joint which allows great adjustability of the light head
The Removable light head has twin 18mm magnets so when its removed it can be separatly fixed giving an additional fixing function
Work light head fixes easily to the bracket and it is simple to direct light on your work area
Hexagonal work light head has wide COB style LED protected by 75mm diameter lens
Light Output – 250 Lumens from 18mm COB LED fitted in 75mm lens
description: You always require extra lighting when working in tight spaces and you will also want to keep both hands free. This new work light has two means to fix the light where you want it, an adjustable clamp and twin 18mm magnets allowing you to do both. The light head is fully adjustable using the ball joint and this can be clamped onto a suitable support and moved and directed where you need it. The LED is COB so has high power with long battery life combined with the strong protective lens this gives the unit a wide beam ideal. This work light suits many different areas, but we think it great when working on cars and plumbing. It is also great with crafts and modelling.
